column1: -- テーブル名: （※ 未指定のため TARGET_TABLE と仮称）
-- 説明: （※ 設計書にテーブル名の記載がないため、お手数ですがご確認ください）
CREATE TABLE TARGET_TABLE (
SAKZYO_KBN CHAR(1) NOT NULL,
HAITA_CNT INTEGER NOT NULL,
SAKSE_DTM TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
LSTUPD_DTM TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
LSTUPD_USER_ID VARCHAR(8) NOT NULL,
NYURYOKU_DTM TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
NYURYOKU_USER_ID VARCHAR(8) NOT NULL,
SHONIN_DTM TIMESTAMP,
SHONIN_USER_ID VARCHAR(8),
SOSHIKI_CD VARCHAR(4) NOT NULL,
GYOSHU_CD VARCHAR(2) NOT NULL,
TEKIYO_KAISHIBI INTEGER NOT NULL,
TEKIYO_SHURYOBI INTEGER DEFAULT 99991231 NOT NULL,
SHINSEI_NO VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
PRIMARY KEY (SOSHIKI_CD, GYOSHU_CD, TEKIYO_KAISHIBI)
-- コメント（COMMENT）
COMMENT ON TABLE TARGET_TABLE IS '組織・業種マスタ（仮）'
COMMENT ON COLUMN TARGET_TABLE.SAKZYO_KBN IS '削除区分'
COMMENT ON COLUMN TARGET_TABLE.HAITA_CNT IS '排他カウンタ'
COMMENT ON COLUMN TARGET_TABLE.SAKSE_DTM IS '作成日時'
COMMENT ON COLUMN TARGET_TABLE.LSTUPD_DTM IS '最終更新日時'
COMMENT ON COLUMN TARGET_TABLE.LSTUPD_USER_ID IS '最終更新者ユーザーＩＤ'
COMMENT ON COLUMN TARGET_TABLE.NYURYOKU_DTM IS '入力日時'
COMMENT ON COLUMN TARGET_TABLE.NYURYOKU_USER_ID IS '入力者ユーザーＩＤ'
COMMENT ON COLUMN TARGET_TABLE.SHONIN_DTM IS '承認日時'
COMMENT ON COLUMN TARGET_TABLE.SHONIN_USER_ID IS '承認者ユーザーＩＤ'
COMMENT ON COLUMN TARGET_TABLE.SOSHIKI_CD IS '組織コード'
COMMENT ON COLUMN TARGET_TABLE.GYOSHU_CD IS '業種コード'
COMMENT ON COLUMN TARGET_TABLE.TEKIYO_KAISHIBI IS '適用開始日'
COMMENT ON COLUMN TARGET_TABLE.TEKIYO_SHURYOBI IS '適用終了日'
COMMENT ON COLUMN TARGET_TABLE.SHINSEI_NO IS '申請番号'
